name: Topsy Turvey Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch pie pan, combine brown sugar, corn syrup, and melted butter. Spread evenly over the bottom of the pan. Arrange pecan or walnut halves over the mixture. Set aside.
2. Make your favorite pie crust. Place the bottom crust over the mixture in the pie pan. Preheat oven to 425°F.
3. In a small bowl, combine sliced apples, sugar, nutmeg, flour, and cinnamon. Mix well. Arrange the apple/sugar mixture over the bottom crust of the pie. Top with the top crust. Seal and flute. Cut slits in several places.
4. Bake at 425°F for 8 minutes. Reduce heat to 375°F and continue baking for 25-35 minutes, or until golden brown. Place the pie on a cookie sheet covered with foil to prevent running over.
5. While the pie is baking, prepare a glaze by mixing 1/2 cup confectioners' sugar, 1 tsp vanilla, and enough milk to make a glaze. Brush the glaze over the top of the pie when removed from the oven and still hot.
6. Remove the pie from the oven. Loosen the edge of the pie. Carefully invert the pie onto a large serving plate. Serve warm or cold with whipped cream or ice cream.
